cases.input: Generate an ADR workbook for a project choosing between Terraform and Bicep for IaC, and Azure SQL vs Cosmos DB for the data store.
cases.context: Enterprise Azure project, architecture decisions need formal documentation

cases.input: Create an effort estimation workbook for a Power Platform project with canvas app, Power Automate flows, Dataverse tables, and integration with SAP via custom connector.
cases.context: Mid-market client, 6-month implementation, mixed Power Platform and Azure

cases.input: Generate a RAID log for a D365 CE implementation. Key risks include data migration complexity, license availability, and integration with legacy CRM. Dependencies include SAP HR data and Azure AD.
Create a test strategy workbook for a hybrid solution with Power Apps model-driven app, Azure Functions backend, and Azure SQL database.
cases.context: Financial services client, UAT sign-off required before go-live

cases.input: We're starting an architecture engagement for a new customer portal on Azure. We need all five standard workbooks: ADR, effort estimation, RAID log, solution design, and test strategy.
cases.context: Greenfield Azure project, public-facing portal, 500K users expected
